{{CargoRelic
|name=Racky's Head
|class_id=20241
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=This unrecognizable head once belonged to War God, one of the eight Demon Gods. With his extraordinary intelligence and devotion to studying technology, he had crafted a set of powerful arms. Yet he was defeated by the snail, and his head became part of the snail's collection.
|fame=15
|art=15
|fth=30
|civ=14
|tech=16
|ss1=Snail HP +200<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail DEF +10<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
|ss2=Snail HP +400<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail DEF +20<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
|ss3=Snail HP +600<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail DEF +30<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
|ss4=Snail HP +600<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail DEF +30<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
|ss7=Snail HP +600<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail DEF +30<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8<br> (Awakened)
}}
